title: client name in info breadcrumb contradicts docs
reason: by-design: 'no client names' claim is metrics-scoped in all docs; operator-assigned label, not a credential

title: client-controlled model string as unbounded metric attribute
reason: by-design: model id is the intended dashboard tag and routing key; double opt-in gating, loopback default, Sentry server-side truncation

title: traces_sample_rate doc slightly overstates the filtering mechanism
reason: style: consistent authorial shorthand used across main.rs comments; user-observable behavior correctly described

title: attach_stacktrace may embed build-time source paths (e.g. builder home dir/username) in error events
reason: by-design: events go to the operator's own DSN; informational, finder itself said no code change needed

title: capture_anyhow on run() errors sends serve/bind error chains to Sentry
reason: speculative: no current context string embeds secrets; hypothetical future-contributor concern, not a defect in this diff

title: Float equality comparison for traces_sample_rate change-detection
reason: by-design: exact-literal change detection for the restart-required warning, not numeric computation

title: New ko/ja/zh-cn content may sit in tension with AGENTS.md's "Docs are English-only" line
reason: by-design: site/ i18n (ko/ja/zh-cn locales) is pre-existing established architecture since #52; AGENTS.md line covers repo docs/code, not the Starlight i18n site — not a diff-introduced violation

title: spawn_blocking JoinError silently dropped without logging
reason: by-design: matches codebase convention for best-effort blocking tasks (account_uuid, account_is_static_store_token); estimate is a cosmetic best-effort value that gracefully degrades to 0

title: Truncated-stream fallback swaps a visible 0-token anomaly for a plausible-looking estimate in the terminal usage report
reason: by-design & test-locked (truncated_stream_falls_back_to_input_token_estimate); truncation is signaled by faked stop_reason:end_turn since M1 4ec674d, not input_tokens; estimate is more accurate (prompt consumed); dropped conn propagates error not this path — no incremental harm

title: ForwardOptions.estimate_input vs turn.client_wants_stream correlation is documented but not type-enforced
reason: convention-only invariant, no observable effect at single construction site; matches repo prose-correlation convention (CodexWsError/Turn); YAGNI

title: PoolForward.pool_key and session_id are independent Options despite a real 1:1 correlation
reason: convention-only invariant, no observable effect at single construction site; encoding would be over-engineering per YAGNI

title: 벤치마크에서 스트리밍 최적화 설정이 제거됨
reason: evidence misattribution: later origin/main commit, absent from merge-base diff

title: take_output allocates the full previous capacity on every non-empty flush
reason: by-design allocation tradeoff versus geometric regrowth; not a confirmed regression

title: Usage endpoint remains active after config reload disables it
reason: by-design: docs/m12 line 46-47 and server.rs line 99-102 explicitly define route registration at boot; reload only re-resolves auth tokens

title: Leading ping prevents message_start alias rewrite
reason: false positive: Anthropic Messages streaming guarantees message_start first; shunt keepalive pings are injected downstream after rewrite

title: Reload behavior incorrectly says only token resolution changes
reason: pre-existing file outside PR #179 diff

title: Codex dashboard values are never cleared when headers disappear
reason: by design: omitted partial headers preserve prior values; expire_stale_quota clears windows and status at reset

title: Responses SSE를 Anthropic 프로토콜로 관찰함
reason: by design: ResponsesAdapter translates upstream Responses SSE into client-facing Anthropic SSE; raw passthrough uses Protocol::Responses

title: TTFT가 upstream 데이터가 아닌 keepalive ping으로 측정될 수 있음
reason: by design: shunt.ttft is explicitly documented as time to the first outward SSE body chunk, including an injected keepalive chunk

title: restore() performs synchronous file I/O on the Tokio runtime
reason: by-design: restore runs once at boot (main.rs:297) strictly before axum::serve accepts requests; no observable impact — repeated flush path already uses spawn_blocking

title: AGENTS.md English-only rule violated by new ko/ja/zh-cn locale content
reason: duplicate of prior rejection b19a8a2d85ae9d8d: site/ i18n locales are established by-design architecture since #52; AGENTS.md English-only line covers repo docs/code, not the Starlight i18n site

title: [non-Unix] 두 번째 저장부터 기존 상태 파일을 교체하지 못합니다
reason: std::fs::rename replaces an existing target file on Windows (MoveFileExW/MOVEFILE_REPLACE_EXISTING or FileRenameInfoEx per current std docs); documented Windows failure is destination-is-a-directory or cross-volume, not existing file. Also save_atomically_replaces_existing_target (src/state_persist.rs:328) is not cfg(unix)-gated and covers the replace path on all platforms. Conclusively refuted.

title: AdmissionGuard releases before the SSE stream finishes (errors finder copy)
reason: duplicate of canonical code-finder copy validated TRUE (adjustedScore 74); dedup per Phase 5.5 rule 3

title: Anthropic OAuth 풀 경로의 storm control에 대한 엔드투엔드 통합 테스트 부재
reason: duplicate of tests finder's anthropic wiring-gap finding (canonical copy validated separately)

title: ramp 배증/idle-reset은 실제로 견고하게 단위 테스트됨 — 우려했던 갭 아님
reason: informational confirmation, not a defect

title: 새 공개 설정 키(state_path) 추가 시 사전 승인 필요 규칙
reason: by design — issue #194 explicitly proposes the state_path key and the user directed both the implementation and the default-on behavior in-session; the Ask-before rule was satisfied

title: token_sha256 invariant is documented, not type-enforced
reason: by design — pub String fields match the pervasive src/gateway convention (Identity, Claims, forms; zero newtype precedent crate-wide); all in-tree construction goes through private token_sha256(); stylistic hardening, no concrete failure path

title: Crafted state file allows identity injection (within local-FS threat model)
reason: by design — local FS write access already equals full compromise in shunt's threat model (credential stores equally tamperable); no new risk from this diff

title: RefreshTokenStore::import/export/take_dirty/mark_dirty are pub, not pub(crate)
reason: by design — matches AccountPool::import_quotas precedent (src/accounts.rs:697); established codebase style

title: Three near-identical structs for one refresh-session record, asymmetric with state_persist.rs's approach
reason: informational — finder itself states no action required; defensible layering, From impls compile-checked

title: dirty AtomicBool and tokens Mutex are independent primitives with a theoretical ordering gap
reason: informational — finder found no lost-mutation window; discipline note only, not a defect

title: inactive_since: Option<u64> as an implicit tri-state liveness signal
reason: informational — finder itself labels it stylistic, matches QuotaState idiom; not a defect

title: Missing model field bypasses availableModels enforcement
reason: refuted: routing::resolve (proxy.rs:136) deserializes RoutingView{model: String} and 400s missing/non-string model and unparseable JSON before the enforcement block; None branch is dead/defensive
